codeReview.summary: The feature correctly tightens cleanup to billing_api rows and adds a cost-only reconciliation path, but it introduces a precision-sensitive guard that can emit phantom cost-only supplemental rows and the new determinism/idempotency tests do not exercise the production reconciliation path.

issues.description: The new guard includes `missingCost > 0` with no epsilon threshold. Because `localCost` is accumulated from floating-point sums (`reduce(0.0)` at line 322) and `missingCost` is derived by subtraction (line 328), tiny representation residue can trigger non-zero cost deltas and create spurious billing_api reconciliation rows. This undermines idempotent convergence for cost-only reconciliation and can cause repeated micro-corrections.

`test_reconciliation_isIdempotent_afterConvergence` validates hand-computed local variables only and never calls the reconciliation flow (`UsageAggregator.refreshAll` / `supplementalUsages`) or asserts persisted post-run state. The deterministic/idempotent coverage claimed for VAL-PERSIST-008 is therefore weak and may miss regressions in real pipeline behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker handoff sets `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true`, but required context-read evidence from the skill procedure is not present in `verification.commandsRun`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff file `/Users/dewclaw/.factory/missions/76dfbf36-62ab-43ad-899f-b8b8f9e47932/handoffs/2026-04-09T13-37-29-397Z__m4-reconciliation-determinism-cleanup-and-cost-deltas__b548bb32-14dd-4a78-b0db-319b03b2b17e.json` lists only test/build commands under `verification.commandsRun` and no command output showing reads of mission/AGENTS/library files, while `.factory/skills/token-accounting-worker/SKILL.md` explicitly requires such evidence before marking followedProcedure true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture/testing library docs appear out of sync with this mission domain (token accounting/reconciliation), reducing their value for worker startup context.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/library/architecture.md` and `.factory/library/user-testing.md` document multi-account switcher/browser/CLI flows, while this mission (`mission.md`) is exact-first token accounting and indexing reconciliation.

summary: Reviewed commit 93314c577ce0202b38b77cdde30b98a9d506fde0 and the worker transcript skeleton for feature m4-reconciliation-determinism-cleanup-and-cost-deltas. Found one blocking implementation issue (floating-point residue can trigger phantom cost-only deltas) and one non-blocking coverage issue (idempotency test does not exercise the real reconciliation path), so the review is marked fail.
